notes: Iter 3 COMPLETE: score=8 (8/26 fields + 0 page advance + 0 submit) — REGRESSION from iter-2=22, iter-1=48. All 8 correct fields (firstName..postalCode) were on page 1 pre-Continue; page 1 NEVER advanced because Country was never set. Flow: turns 1-2 filled page-1 fields, select_option(e73, Country) failed (e73 combobox not <select>), Continue -> FORM NOT ADVANCED (state+country missing, steer worked the FIRST time); turn 3 State TX set; turn 4 agent clicked e73 -> Country listbox opened (e189=United States); turn 5 agent called select_option(e188, 'United States') where e188 is the LISTBOX container not the trigger -> tool pressed Escape (CLOSED listbox without selecting) then clicked invisible e188 -> Country NEVER set; turns 6-9 four BLIND Continue clicks -> Country alert was PRE-EXISTING from turn 2, _check_dom_delta saw NO NEW alerts -> FORM NOT ADVANCED steer did NOT re-fire -> agent got no feedback. ITER-4 FIXES: (1) _check_dom_delta now surfaces ALL visible alert nodes after a Continue (pre-existing OR new), and no longer early-returns when no new refs appeared, so the steer re-fires on every blind Continue while errors remain; (2) _select_via_combobox detects when target is an already-OPEN listbox/option (target_is_open_listbox) and clicks the matching option directly instead of Escape+re-click; (3) task_iter4.txt State now says 'TX (TWO-LETTER abbreviation, NOT Texas)'. Tests: added OpenListboxTargetTest (4 cases, pass); 12 pre-existing test_web.py failures are stale calls[-1]==verb asserts (tools now end with a trailing snapshot from _check_dom_delta) — NOT introduced by this change. See issue #142.

ground_truth.tool_schema_format: bare {name,description,parameters} for hand-crafted <tools>; ENVELOPED {type:function,function:{...}} for Ollama native tools: API field
ground_truth.tool_result_role: role:tool works via Ollama native API (Ollama handles it internally)
ground_truth.vibethinker_model: WeiboAI/VibeThinker-1.5B; as an ADVISOR it has NO page snapshot so it hallucinates refs -> DISABLED
ground_truth.qwen3_behavior: qwen3:4b on Ollama returns STRUCTURED message.tool_calls (qwen2.5-coder returned null+text). Thinking routes to message.thinking; content is clean. HermesCodec is zero-changes compatible.
ground_truth.form_widgets: job form: 12 custom <button role=combobox> dropdowns (use select_option, NOT fill); a custom calendar DatePicker (navigate year/month then click ISO-labeled day cell); MultiSelect skills; NumberStepper (spinbutton, click +N times); Checkbox certify; SignaturePad; FileUpload; ~26 fields across 8 pages
ground_truth.advisor_decision: DISABLED. Run command must NOT pass --advisor.
ground_truth.context_window: num_ctx=32768 required (OLLAMA_FLASH_ATTENTION=1 makes it safe at ~4500 MiB). 16384 gives only 7168 token input budget — too small for 8-page form. Restore to 32768.
ground_truth.scoring_system: GET http://localhost:3000/api/score/session-end at end of each run. Writes .vibe/last_benchmark_score.json with commitMessageStart.
ground_truth.loop_issue: Full loop architecture documented in GitHub issue #142 on VibeHarness repo.
ground_truth.iter3_fixes: Escape in _select_via_combobox; work arrangement='Hybrid'; ONE-DROPDOWN-AT-A-TIME warning; calendar select_option is atomic in tool (no manual nav needed); _check_dom_delta surfaces validation alerts on rejected Continue (FORM NOT ADVANCED steer) to break blind Continue loops
ground_truth.iter4_fixes: _check_dom_delta re-surfaces ALL visible alerts after Continue (not just NEW ones) + no early-return on empty new_refs -> steer re-fires on every blind Continue while errors remain (root cause 1); _select_via_combobox detects target that is an already-OPEN listbox/option (target_is_open_listbox) and clicks the option directly instead of Escape+re-click which would close the list unselected (root cause 2); task_iter4.txt State='TX (TWO-LETTER abbreviation, NOT Texas)' (root cause 3)
